description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, angular profile and a distinctly layered appearance. The surface displays a mix of reddish-brown and earthy tones, with visible striations and natural textural variations that suggest sedimentary origins. One side of the stone is relatively flat and broad, while the opposite side tapers to a rough, jagged edge. The stone's surface is predominantly rough and matte, with some areas showing deeper grooves and weathered indentations. The coloration is uneven, with darker patches and lighter streaks, giving it a natural, weathered look. This stone would be commonly found as a landscape feature or as an obstacle in urban parks, sidewalks, or roadside environments.
description: A large, rugged, reddish-brown stone with layered textures and a rough, weathered surface. Its irregular shape and earthy coloration make it a natural-looking urban barrier.
description_view_0: The stone appears triangular with a prominent sloped face and visible layering, showing both rough and smoother surfaces.
description_view_1: This view highlights a broad, flat side with pronounced dark striations and a blocky, angular profile.
description_view_2: The underside is visible, revealing a hollowed or concave area and deep shadowing, emphasizing the stone's irregular geometry.
description_view_3: A nearly vertical, flat face is shown, dominated by dark, weathered streaks and a rough, matte finish.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, or landscaped public space
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular natural layering and striations with mottled color patches; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with visible surface erosion and some deeper grooves, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or manicured urban surfaces but may blend with natural landscaping or other stones; could be partially surrounded by grass or soil.
